codeReview.summary: Reviewed the refactor commit, handoff, transcript skeleton, and the coins route characterization coverage. The refactor cleanly split the oversized module into focused helpers/detail/chart/market-data units while preserving the route surface and key contract paths covered by app, compatibility, and stale-data tests. I did not find evidence of contract drift or correctness regressions in the reviewed implementation.

summary: Pass. The coins module refactor appears behavior-preserving, follows the safe-refactor procedure, and remains protected by representative characterization coverage for markets, detail, contract, chart/OHLC, movers, categories, and stale/degraded paths. No shared-state gaps were identified from the reviewed evidence.
